text.title: RAG Feature Acceptance Contract — Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: support-RAG bot with two intents — policy-lookup and troubleshooting — signed at v1.2.

example.title: Support-RAG acceptance contract v1.2
example.code:
feature: support-rag version: 1.2.0
intents: policy-lookup: pm_outcome: "Resolve customer policy questions without human escalation" acceptable_failure: "Refusal-to-answer (route to human) acceptable; hallucinated policy is NOT" sme_rubric: pass: "Cites correct policy section; quoted text matches source verbatim" borderline: "Cites correct section; paraphrases instead of quoting" fail: "No citation OR cited section does not contain the claim" offline: faithfulness: threshold: ">= 0.92" baseline: "junior agent 0.94 on same eval set" context-precision: threshold: ">= 0.85" baseline: "current production 0.78" online: thumbs-down-rate: threshold: "<= 3%" baseline: "today 7%" escalation-rate: threshold: "<= 12%" baseline: "today 22%"
troubleshooting: pm_outcome: "Walk user through fix; partial diagnosis acceptable" acceptable_failure: "Wrong-but-safe step acceptable; destructive wrong step is NOT" sme_rubric: pass: "Steps in correct order; no destructive step before confirmation" fail: "Recommends data-destructive action without prior backup step" offline: answer-relevance: threshold: ">= 0.80" baseline: "previous prompt version 0.71" destructive-step-detector: threshold: "== 0" baseline: "hard zero from PM" online: follow-up-rephrase-rate: threshold: "<= 18%" baseline: "today 31%" data-loss-incidents: threshold: "== 0" baseline: "hard zero from legal"
signatures: pm: "alice@co 2026-04-12 v1.2" sme: "ravi@co 2026-04-12 v1.2" ml_engineer: "jonas@co 2026-04-12 v1.2"
recontract_triggers: - "query_intent_distribution_shift_chi2_p < 0.01" - "embedding_model_upgrade" - "online_vs_offline_divergence >= 0.20" - "last_signed_date > 180_days"
example.note: Two intents (r1), three named signatures with dates (r2), every offline metric paired with online (r3), every threshold cites a baseline (r4), four explicit recontract triggers (r5).

example.title: What the regression gate does with this contract
example.code: PR opened → CI loads acceptance-contract.yaml v1.2 → runs eval harness for both intents on labelled set → policy-lookup.faithfulness = 0.94 (>= 0.92) PASS → policy-lookup.context-precision = 0.83 (< 0.85) FAIL → CI exits non-zero; PR blocked → engineer either improves retrieval OR opens recontract ticket
example.note: The contract is executable: numbers are compared automatically; humans only intervene to re-sign.
